name: Mutual NDA
description: Common Paper standard Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement for protecting confidential information between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement with customizable fields.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement for SaaS products and cloud services.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for companies partnering on product design and development with early access programs.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Standard SLA defining uptime guarantees, response times, and service credits.

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: Agreement governing the processing of personal data in compliance with GDPR and other data protection laws.

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: Agreement for professional services engagements including statements of work.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Agreement for pilot programs allowing customers to evaluate a product before committing.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Agreement for business partnerships including trademark licensing and joint marketing.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Agreement for licensing software products with usage rights and restrictions.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement for business associates handling protected health information.
